responseMessageContents.text: The user is asking me to send a "security box" (requestEnvs) for the GitHub token only. They want to provide a new GitHub token to complete the end-to-end deployment.

envs.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
envs.description: GitHub personal access token (classic) with repo and workflow scopes

input.reason: GitHub token needed to push code and complete the end-to-end deployment audit. Previous token returned 401 (expired/revoked).

requestedEnvs.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
requestedEnvs.description: GitHub personal access token (classic) with repo and workflow scopes
